segments.template: <p:gray_untracked> </>{{ .UpstreamIcon }} {{ .HEAD }}{{if .BranchStatus }} {{ .BranchStatus }}{{ end }}{{ if .Working.Changed }}<p:red_alert>  {{ .Working.String }}</>{{ end }}{{ if and (.Working.Changed) (.Staging.Changed) }} |{{ end }}{{ if .Staging.Changed }}<p:green_added>  {{ .Staging.String }}</>{{ end }}{{ if gt .StashCount 0 }}  {{ .StashCount }}{{ end }}

console_title_template: {{ if .Segments.git-lprompt }}{{ if .Segments.git-lprompt.RepoName }}{{ .Segments.git-lprompt.RepoName }}{{ else }}{{ .Folder }}{{ end }} [{{ trim .Segments.git-lprompt.HEAD }}{{ if .Segments.git-lprompt.BranchStatus }} {{ trim .Segments.git-lprompt.BranchStatus }}{{ end }}]{{ else }}{{ .Folder }}{{ end }}{{ if .Root }} (root){{ end }} - {{ .Shell }}

tooltips.template: {{ .HomeTeam}}{{ if .HasStats }} ({{.HomeTeamWins}}-{{.HomeTeamLosses}}){{ end }}{{ if .Started }}:{{.HomeScore}}{{ end }} vs {{ .AwayTeam}}{{ if .HasStats }} ({{.AwayTeamWins}}-{{.AwayTeamLosses}}){{ end }}{{ if .Started }}:{{.AwayScore}}{{ end }} | {{ if not .Started }}{{.GameDate}} | {{ end }}{{.Time}}

{{ if .Error }}{{ .Error }}{{ else }}{{ .Icon }} {{ $name := default "(no activity)" .Name }}{{ if gt (len $name) 38 }}{{ trunc 38 $name }}…{{ else }}{{ $name }}{{ end }}{{ $t := default "" .Type }}{{ if $t }} • {{ $t }}{{ end }}{{ $dist := default 0.0 .Distance }}{{ if gt $dist 0.0 }} • {{ printf "%.1f" (divf $dist 1609.34) }}mi{{ end }}{{ $dur := default 0.0 .Duration }}{{ if gt $dur 0.0 }} • {{ $s := int $dur }}{{ $h := div $s 3600 }}{{ $m := div (mod $s 3600) 60 }}{{ if gt $h 0 }}{{ printf "%dh%02dm" $h $m }}{{ else }}{{ printf "%dm" $m }}{{ end }}{{ end }}{{ $ahr := default 0.0 .AverageHeartRate }}{{ if gt $ahr 0.0 }} •  {{ printf "%.0f" $ahr }}{{ $mhr := default 0.0 .MaxHeartRate }}{{ if gt $mhr 0.0 }}/{{ printf "%.0f" $mhr }}{{ end }}bpm{{ end }}{{ $aw := default 0.0 .AverageWatts }}{{ if or .DeviceWatts (gt $aw 0.0) }} •  {{ printf "%.0f" $aw }}W{{ $waw := default 0.0 .WeightedAverageWatts }}{{ if gt $waw 0.0 }} ({{ printf "%.0f" $waw }}W){{ end }}{{ end }}{{ $k := default 0 .KudosCount }}{{ if gt $k 0 }} •  {{ $k }}{{ end }} • {{ .Ago }}{{ end }}

options.branch_template: {{ if .Mapped }}{{ $m := title .Mapped }}{{ if gt (len $m) 24 }}{{ trunc 24 $m }}…{{ else }}{{ $m }}{{ end }}{{ else }}{{ .Icon }}{{ $b := title .Branch }}{{ if gt (len $b) 24 }}{{ trunc 24 $b }}…{{ else }}{{ $b }}{{ end }}{{ end }}

tooltips.template:  {{ .HEAD }}{{ if .BranchStatus }} {{ .BranchStatus }}{{ end }} | {{ .UpstreamIcon }} ↑{{ .Ahead }} ↓{{ .Behind }}{{ if .Staging.Changed }} |  {{ .Staging.String }}{{ end }}{{ if .Working.Changed }} |  {{ .Working.String }}{{ else }} |  clean{{ end }}
 Python {{ if .Error }}{{ .Error }}{{ else }}{{ if .Venv }} {{ .Venv }} {{ end }}{{ .Full }}{{ end }}
{{ if .Segments.npm-rprompt }}{{ else }} {{ if .PackageManagerIcon }}{{ .PackageManagerIcon }} {{ end }}{{ .Full }}{{ if .Mismatch }} ⚠ mismatch{{ end }}{{ end }}

background_templates: {{ if or (ge .PhysicalPercentUsed 90) (ge .Disks 90) (ge .Load1 90) }}p:sysinfo_bg_crit{{ else if or (ge .PhysicalPercentUsed 80) (ge .Disks 80) (ge .Load1 80) }}p:sysinfo_bg_warn{{ else }}p:sysinfo_bg_ok{{ end }}
tooltips.template:  CPU {{ round .Load1 .Precision }}%   MEM {{ round .PhysicalPercentUsed .Precision }}%   DSK {{ round .Disks .Precision }}%

background_templates: {{ if .Premium.Unlimited }}p:copilot_bg{{ else if ge .Premium.Percent 90 }}p:maroon_error{{ else if ge .Premium.Percent 85 }}p:red_alert{{ else if ge .Premium.Percent 50 }}p:orange_warning{{ else }}p:green_success{{ end }}
foreground_templates: {{ if .Premium.Unlimited }}p:white{{ else if ge .Premium.Percent 75 }}p:white{{ else }}p:black{{ end }}

tooltips.template: {{ if eq .Code 0 }} Success{{ else if eq .Code 127 }}CMD NOT FOUND{{ else if eq .Code 130 }}CANCELLED{{ else }} Error: {{ .Code }}{{ end }}

background_templates: {{ if gt .PromptCount 500 }}p:maroon_error{{ else if gt .PromptCount 200 }}p:red_alert{{ else if gt .PromptCount 100 }}p:orange_warning{{ else if gt .PromptCount 50 }}p:tooling_yellow{{ else }}p:gray_prompt_count_bg{{ end }}

tooltips.template: {{ if .Error }}{{ .Error }}{{ else }}{{ if .Version }} {{.Version}}{{ end }} {{ if .Name }}{{ title .Name }}{{ end }}{{ end }}
 Azure: {{ if .Name }}{{ .Name }}{{ else }}{{ .EnvironmentName }}{{ end }}{{ if .TenantDisplayName }} | {{ .TenantDisplayName }}{{ end }}
 GCP: {{ if .Error }}{{ .Error }}{{ else }}{{ .Project }}{{ if .Region }}@{{ .Region }}{{ end }} | {{ .Account }}{{ end }}

background_templates: {{ if gt .CumulativeTotal.Seconds 14400 }}p:green_success{{ else if and (gt .CumulativeTotal.Seconds 7200) (le .CumulativeTotal.Seconds 14400) }}p:yellow_bright{{ else }}p:red_alert{{ end }}

{{ $s := .CumulativeTotal.Seconds }}{{ if lt $s 36000 }}p:red_alert{{ else if lt $s 90000 }}p:orange_warning{{ else if lt $s 180000 }}p:yellow_bright{{ else if lt $s 288000 }}p:green_success{{ else }}p:blue_bright{{ end }}

{{ $s := .Body.data.total_seconds_including_other_language }}{{ if lt $s 180000 }}p:red_alert{{ else if lt $s 540000 }}p:orange_warning{{ else if lt $s 1080000 }}p:yellow_bright{{ else if lt $s 2160000 }}p:green_success{{ else }}p:blue_bright{{ end }}
